title: solidago neglecta var. linoides
intro: Solidago neglecta var. linoides, also known as upright leafy goldenrod, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the aster family (Asteraceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Solidago neglecta var. linoides include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
